top_signals.title: Yen Rebound Ebbs After Brief Rally on Outlook for BOJ Rate Hikes
top_signals.summary: The yen slid beyond 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986 before recovering some ground in choppy trading on the prospect of faster interest-rate hikes from the Bank of Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stocks Churn Late as Big-Tech Earnings Kick Off: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks wavering in late hours as they sifted through results from megacaps for clues on whether their massive artificial-intelligence investments are paying off.
